1603a2.name: McMaster 1603A2 Brass Surface-Mount Hinge
1603a2.notes: Small brass surface-mount hinge. Good for jewelry boxes, small lids under 6 inches.

1603a3.name: McMaster 1603A3 Brass Surface-Mount Hinge
1603a3.notes: Medium brass surface-mount hinge. Good for boxes 6-12 inches, small chests.

1603a7.name: McMaster 1603A7 Brass Surface-Mount Hinge
1603a7.notes: Large brass surface-mount hinge. Good for chests, blanket boxes, lids over 12 inches.

92114a079.name: McMaster 92114A079 #2 x 3/8" Brass Flat Head Wood Screw
92114a079.notes: Brass Phillips flat head wood screw. For 1603A2 and 1603A3 hinges.

92114a196.name: McMaster 92114A196 #8 x 5/8" Brass Flat Head Wood Screw
92114a196.notes: Brass Phillips flat head wood screw. For 1603A7 hinges.

hinge.description: Choose hinge size based on lid length. Use 2 hinges per lid, spaced 1/5 from each edge.

rules.reason: Small hinge for jewelry boxes and small lids
Large hinge for chests and blanket boxes

hinge.spacing: Place hinges at 1/5 and 4/5 of the lid length. For a single centered hinge, place at 1/2.
hinge.installation: Pin axis at the joint line between back board top edge and lid back edge. Each leaf mortised flush into its respective board surface.
